case_title: HASHMA SHAHID VS. GREEN HILLS VIEWS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-03-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN HILLS VIEWS
